name: Operand
long_description:
Operand works with leading private equity funds across the deal lifecycle, from commercial due diligence through post-close value creation. 

Operand uses proprietary data collection agents and machine learning systems to generate informational alpha for funds, including four of the ten largest private equity mega-funds in the US. 

In October 2025, the Operand 'Quant' topped OpenAI's MLE-Benchmark, achieving state-of-the-art performance and beating OpenAI, Microsoft, and Google. MLE-Benchmark measures the abilities of long-horizon, autonomous agents on competition-style machine learning and data science problems.
